description_long: This is a single, high-ankle boot made of weathered brown leather, showing significant signs of wear and use. The boot features a tall shaft with visible creases and scuffs, and a lace-up front with eyelets running up the length of the tongue. The leather surface appears aged, with discoloration and dirt accumulation, especially around the sole and heel. The sole is thick and slightly uneven, suggesting extensive outdoor use, but the tread pattern is not visible. The stitching is prominent along the seams, and the top edge of the boot is slightly frayed. Overall, the boot has a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or work environments.
description: A tall, weathered brown leather boot with a lace-up front and visible signs of heavy use. The surface is scuffed and aged, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: The left side of the boot shows heavy creasing and scuffing, with the toe and heel areas appearing especially worn.
description_view_1: The rear and outer side of the boot highlight the seam running up the back and the pronounced wear on the heel and lower shaft.
description_view_2: The right side and front display the lace-up system and the boot's tall shaft, with visible eyelets and stitching.
description_view_3: The front and left side show the laces, tongue, and the most pronounced scuffing on the toe and lower shaft.
